project_entry.execHeadline: Natural & Built LLC 162 Ten achieved 49.7% margin on $0.72M with 24 workers across 92 units over 22 months.
project_entry.execBody:
Natural & Built 162 Ten is a 92-unit multifamily new construction plumbing at 16210 NE 80th St, Redmond WA. $717,400 Lump Sum subcontract revised to final $722,900 via executed COs (net +$5,500 / +0.8%). 18 billings across 22 months (Aug 2016 → Jun 2018), 24 workers · 5,205 hrs.

Labor ran 18.5% of revenue ($133,452 / 5,205 hrs = $25.19/hr blended) with material at 22.1% ($159,410). Top 4 AP vendors = ~94% of $135,428 AP across 16 vendors. Top worker Reed, Reuben H logged 21.0% share (1092 hrs). GL overhead $1,509 = 0.2% of revenue.

Cortex pattern: 162 Ten is a strong-margin project for Natural & Built LLC — additive CO profile. Not Wrap insurance. $36,115 retainage outstanding 7+ years post-closeout — collection flag.
